subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-07 ca.
subcodes.first_line: If a friend dies and leaves behind some debt, the believers must do their utmost to pay it off to the very last cent.
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
